title: MC+Vanilla
description: A vanilla-like MC+ experience for anyone who wants to play Minecraft in a superior way. 50 of the best mods all working together to create a Minecraft you will love.
body:
A vanilla-like MC+ experience for anyone who wants to play Minecraft in a superior way. 50 of the best mods all working together to create a Minecraft you will love.
equiped with a bunch of mods that enhance exploration give life with fresh animations some quality of life improovements and more overall great features.
i highly recomed hysteria shaders
